title: breynia disticha var. genuina
intro: Breynia disticha var. genuina, also known as the Snowflake Plant or Snow Bush, is a type of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Breynia disticha var. genuina include treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections due to its antimicrobial properties, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce anxiety. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using it as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
